pages.title: Gem Coatings
pages.text: Gem traits come from $(bold)lapidary-coated parts$(), not from forging raw gems against a pattern.$(p)Ruby and sapphire accept the pack's common gem tags.$(p)This allows compatible gems from another mod to resolve to the correct MTF material identity.

pages.title: Diamond and Emerald
pages.text: $(bold)Stabilized — diamond$()$(li)×1.08 durability$(li)×1.01 mining speed$(p)$(bold)Fortunate — emerald$()$(li)Luck affinity$(li)Trade affinity$(li)Fortune affinity$(p)MTF applies no direct loot or Fortune increase.

pages.title: Ruby and Sapphire
pages.text: $(bold)Keen — ruby$()$(li)+0.15 attack damage$(li)Support slot also grants Fortunate$(p)$(bold)Focused — sapphire$()$(li)+0.03 attack speed$(li)Enchanting/resonance affinity$(li)Support slot also grants Resonant$(li)Resonant adds ×1.005 mining speed

pages.title: Flint
pages.text: $(bold)Jagged — flint$()$(li)+0.10 attack damage$(li)×0.96 durability$(p)Jagged belongs to crude flint construction.$(p)The hidden legacy Flint Shard item is $(bold)not$() required to obtain this trait.
